Now I have a comprehensive picture. Here's the summary of everything that changed since your last sync:

---

## Sync Complete — 1,794 commits pulled

**2,864 files changed** | **177,191 insertions** | **74,081 deletions** | **74 community contributions**

---

### New Features

**Providers & Models**

- **Google Vertex AI routing** — Claude model requests can now route through Google Vertex AI
- **Gemini web search** — Gemini (Google Search grounding) added as a `web_search` provider
- **Gemini 3.1** support added
- **Mistral provider** — full Mistral support including memory embeddings and voice
- **Volcengine/BytePlus** — Volcano Engine (Doubao) and BytePlus providers with coding variants
- **OpenRouter routing params** — pass-through provider routing parameters from model params
- **Moonshot/Kimi** — refreshed vision capabilities, developer role compat, token-limit overflow detection

**Channels**

- **Synology Chat** — new native channel plugin with webhook ingress, DM routing, outbound media
- **Discord voice** — `/vc` join/leave/status, auto-join for realtime voice conversations
- **Discord streaming** — live draft reply previews with partial/block options
- **Discord forum tags** — support updating `available_tags` via channel edit
- **Discord ephemeral** — configurable ephemeral defaults for slash-command responses
- **Discord thread-bound subagents** — per-thread focus/list controls and continuation routing
- **Discord/Telegram lifecycle reactions** — configurable emoji reactions for queued/thinking/tool/done/error phases
- **Feishu persistent dedupe** — namespace-scoped persistent message deduplication
- **Per-channel model overrides** via `channels.modelByChannel`
- **Default delivery target** — `defaultTo` outbound routing fallback per account/channel

**Memory & Search**

- **Multi-language FTS expansion** — Japanese, Korean, Arabic, Spanish, Portuguese stop-word filtering
- **QMD mcporter** keep-alive search routing to reduce cold starts
- **MMR and temporal decay** — improved ranking with schema changes

**iOS**

- APNs registration and push wake pipeline
- Gateway talk defaults and icon asset refresh
- Background wake/reconnect stabilization with BGAppRefresh, location wake, APNs retry
- Watch notification bridging for quick-reply actions

**Core / Gateway**

- **Auto-updater** — optional built-in auto-update for package installs (`update.auto.*`), default-off
- **`openclaw update --dry-run`** — preview channel/tag/target/restart actions
- **Config UI tag-aware filtering** — broader config labels/help copy for dashboard settings
- **Web UI cron parity** — full cron edit, clone, all-jobs run history with pagination/search/sort/filters
- **Agents tools catalog** — data-driven UI with provenance labels (core / plugin)
- **Cached token counts** surfaced in `/status` output
- **Model fallback visibility** — verbose logs, status active-model context, WebUI fallback indicators
- **Logger log level validation** support
- **Update warning banner** in control dashboard

---

### Breaking Changes

- **Google Antigravity removed** — provider support and `google-antigravity-auth` plugin gone; migrate to `google-gemini-cli`
- **Tool failure details hidden** — raw error details require `/verbose on` or `/verbose full`
- **DM scope default** — `session.dmScope` now defaults to `per-channel-peer` for new installs
- **Streaming config unified** — `channels.<channel>.streaming` with enum values `off | partial | block | progress`
- **Device auth v1 removed** — clients must sign v2 payloads with nonce

---

### Security (20+ fixes)

Major security hardening across the board:

- **Exec allowlist bypasses** blocked: obfuscated commands, shell-wrapper smuggling, line-continuation bypasses, `sort --compress-program`, env variable injection (`HOME`, `ZDOTDIR`, `SHELLOPTS`, `PS4`)
- **XSS fix** in HTML gallery generation for skill outputs
- **OTEL log redaction** of API keys, tokens, credentials before OTLP export
- **SSRF expansion** — RFC special-use/non-global IP ranges, IPv6 normalization, benchmarking range blocking
- **Symlink traversal** blocked for: archives, Control UI static files, avatar serving, media sandbox, hook transforms
- **Prototype pollution** blocked in config merge/migration paths
- **Pre-commit security hooks** enforced in CI
- **Credential session redaction** in `sessions_history` tool output
- **Discord allowlist** slug-collision warnings for name/tag-based entries
- **Inbound media byte limits** enforced across Discord, Telegram, Zalo, MSTeams, BlueBubbles
- **CSPRNG tokens** for Slack menus, Tlon channel IDs
- **SHA-1 to SHA-256 migration** for gateway lock and tool-call synthetic IDs

---

### Major Bug Fixes

**Agents & Reasoning**

- Auto-reasoning no longer leaks `Reasoning:` blocks when thinking is already active
- Context overflow detection expanded (Chinese patterns, Groq TPM limits, additional provider shapes)
- Compaction no longer truncates history when summarization fails — cancels instead
- Agent defaults.model fallback fixed for agents without explicit model config
- Strict OpenAI-compatible turn ordering normalized
- Tool-call name validation prevents poisoned sessions from malformed failover names

**Telegram**

- Reaction handling soft-fails gracefully on policy/token/API errors
- Polling offsets scoped per bot to prevent cross-token bleed
- Webhook monitors stay alive until abort, preventing false restart loops
- Target normalization fixed for topic-qualified targets
- Forward burst coalescing with dedicated debounce window
- Streaming preview no longer orphans stale messages under send/rotation races

**Slack**

- Thread session forking works beyond first turn
- `replyToMode` respected when Slack auto-populates `thread_ts`
- File uploads to DMs now resolve user IDs to DM channel IDs
- Extension `threadId` forwarded correctly for reads/replies

**Cron**

- Execution/delivery status split for clearer failure visibility
- `maxConcurrentRuns` honored (was always serial before)
- Manual runs get same timeout guards as timer-driven runs
- Per-`every` job scheduling now uses last-run cadence after restarts
- Manual runs no longer block `cron.list`/`cron.status`

**Gateway**

- Repeated unauthorized WS request floods stopped per connection
- Pairing: `operator.admin` satisfies other `operator.*` scope checks
- Auto-approve loopback scope-upgrade pairing requests
- Restart-loop edge cases fixed
- Stale-lock detection uses port-reachability liveness signal

**Webchat**

- Final payloads render without waiting for full history refresh
- Session routing metadata preserved (no more Telegram->webchat misrouting)

**Browser Extension**

- MV3 worker preserves debugger attachments across relay drops
- Auto-reconnect with bounded backoff+jitter
- Stale socket guard and per-tab operation locks

---

### Test & Performance

A huge effort went into test optimization (~625 test commits):

- Massive test consolidation: redundant suites merged, sharded tests collapsed
- Timer/timeout tightening across all test files
- Table-driven test patterns adopted broadly
- Coverage maintained at 70% thresholds

---

### Refactoring

~304 refactoring commits focused on:

- Shared helper extraction (security, agents, CLI, gateway, plugins)
- Deduplicated code paths across channels
- Plugin loader and hook loading optimizations
- Shared dedupe primitives in plugin SDK

```
/Users/swappid/Code/openclaw/clawdbot/scripts/restart-mac.sh
#!/usr/bin/env bash
# Reset OpenClaw like Trimmy: kill running instances, rebuild, repackage, relaunch, verify.

set -euo pipefail

ROOT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")/.." &amp;&amp; pwd)"
APP_BUNDLE="${OPENCLAW_APP_BUNDLE:-}"
APP_PROCESS_PATTERN="OpenClaw.app/Contents/MacOS/OpenClaw"
DEBUG_PROCESS_PATTERN="${ROOT_DIR}/apps/macos/.build/debug/OpenClaw"
LOCAL_PROCESS_PATTERN="${ROOT_DIR}/apps/macos/.build-local/debug/OpenClaw"
RELEASE_PROCESS_PATTERN="${ROOT_DIR}/apps/macos/.build/release/OpenClaw"
LAUNCH_AGENT="${HOME}/Library/LaunchAgents/ai.openclaw.mac.plist"
LOCK_KEY="$(printf '%s' "${ROOT_DIR}" | shasum -a 256 | cut -c1-8)"
LOCK_DIR="${TMPDIR:-/tmp}/openclaw-restart-${LOCK_KEY}"
LOCK_PID_FILE="${LOCK_DIR}/pid"
WAIT_FOR_LOCK=0
LOG_PATH="${OPENCLAW_RESTART_LOG:-/tmp/openclaw-restart.log}"
NO_SIGN=0
SIGN=0
AUTO_DETECT_SIGNING=1

```

</details>
</tool-use>

macOS ties permissions to the code signature, bundle ID, and app path.
Ad-hoc signing generates a new signature every build, so macOS treats the app
as a different binary and will forget permissions (prompts may vanish).

For correct permission behavior you MUST sign with a real Apple Development or
Developer ID certificate.

If prompts disappear: remove the app entry in System Settings -&gt; Privacy &amp; Security,
relaunch the app, and re-grant. Some permissions only reappear after a full
macOS restart.

**Sync** — 1,047 commits pulled and rebased successfully.

**Dependencies** — Reinstalled (`pnpm install`), including updated packages (oxlint 1.50, oxfmt 0.35, Pi core 0.55.1, AWS SDK 3.998, etc.).

**TypeScript build** — `pnpm build` completed, `dist/` is fresh.

**Gateway is running** on `ws://127.0.0.1:18789`:

- Token: `u6Apf2olsSXnftroYx16REudbHw1vLN5WAIq-Je_Jts`

- Control UI serving at `http://localhost:18789/`
- Browser control on port 18791
- WebChat client connected

**macOS app build blocked** — Xcode license hasn't been accepted after a recent Xcode update. You need to run this in your terminal:

```bash
sudo xcodebuild -license accept
```

Once that's done, run the full app rebuild:

```bash
bash scripts/restart-mac.sh
```

This will Swift-build the macOS app, package it into `dist/OpenClaw.app`, sign it, and relaunch with the gateway attached.

**iOS/Android** — No physical devices detected (no `adb`, no `xcrun xctrace` access). iOS build also needs the Xcode license fix above. After that, builds can be triggered from `apps/ios/` (Xcode project) and `apps/android/` (Gradle). Those also need to be built directly on the Mac, not over this environment.

The gateway is live and healthy right now with all the latest code from the 1,047-commit sync.
